description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a tan polymer stock and receiver, contrasted by a black barrel, magazine, and other metal components. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and both front and rear flip-up iron sights are present. The stock is fixed and robust, providing stability for accurate shooting, while the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfort and control. The magazine is a detachable box type, likely holding intermediate rifle cartridges. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, suitable for reducing muzzle flash during firing. The overall construction suggests a blend of polymer and metal materials for durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, full-length Picatinny rail, flip-up iron sights, and a detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan stock, pistol grip, full-length Picatinny rail, flip-up sights, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the sights along the rail.
